## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Description
Write a small description here

## Before request creation Checklist
- [ ] ID of user story is in the request title
- [ ] ID of user story is in the branch title
- [ ] Code tested with most coverage possible
- [ ] Documentation/commenting where needed

## Before merge Checklist
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] Build completed
- [ ] Approved by two people
- [ ] Squash commits selected as merge option

## After merge : Delete the branch (DO NOT DELETE DEV!!!!)
